name: sssf-agent
description: SSSF customer-support agent — RAG + deterministic calc engine for Sharjah Social Security Fund pensioners

scripts.chunk:law-ar: tsx scripts/chunk-law.ts --file "corpus/raw/قانون الضمان بالعناوين.docx" --doc-key law_5_2018_ar --lang ar --authority "Law 5/2018" --out corpus/clean/law_5_2018_ar.jsonl
scripts.chunk:law-en: tsx scripts/chunk-law.ts --file "corpus/raw/English SSSF Law word.docx" --doc-key law_5_2018_en --lang en --authority "Law 5/2018" --out corpus/clean/law_5_2018_en.jsonl
